Line 112:  
Line 113:  BeginContext("~/Views/Admin/Dashbord1.cshtml", 358, 1167, true);
Line 114:  
Line 115:  WriteLiteral(@">
Line 116:          table.PartnerTypes {
Line 117:              border-collapse: collapse;
Line 118:              border: 1px solid black;
Line 119:          }
Line 120:          table.TestTable {
Line 121:              border-collapse: collapse;
Line 122:              border: 1px solid black;
Line 123:          }
Line 124:  
Line 125:              table td {
Line 126:                  border: 1px solid black;
Line 127:                  font-size: 12px;
Line 128:              }
Line 129:  
Line 130:              table th {
Line 131:                  border: 1px solid black;
Line 132:                  font-size: 12px;
Line 133:                  text-align: right;
Line 134:                  padding-right: 0;
Line 135:              }
Line 136:  
Line 137:              table.PartnerTypes td.AlgnRight {
Line 138:                  text-align: right;
Line 139:                  color: darkblue;
Line 140:                  padding-right: 0;
Line 141:              }
Line 142:  
Line 143:              table.TestTable th {
Line 144:                  border: 1px solid black;
Line 145:                  font-size: 12px;
Line 146:                  text-align: center;
Line 147:                  padding-right: 0;
Line 148:              }
Line 149:  
Line 150:              table.TestTable td.AlgnRight {
Line 151:                  text-align: right;
Line 152:                  color: darkblue;
Line 153:                  padding-right: 0;
Line 154:                  width: 25px;
Line 155:                  font-weight: bold;
Line 156:              }
Line 157:      </style>
Line 158:      <table");
Line 159:  
Line 160:  EndContext("~/Views/Admin/Dashbord1.cshtml", 358, 1167, true);
